_note: Ready-to-insert interactive_image block for the male reproductive system (Class 12 Human Reproduction). Generated via a rephrased clinical-textbook prompt after the original explicit-anatomy-worded prompt was silently blocked by ChatGPT's image content policy twice in a row (see LABEL_SPRINT_ORGAN_LIST.md progress notes, 2026-07-15). Image keyed via prepare_illustration.py's new 'white' background mode (added 2026-07-15) -- the source PNG had an opaque white background despite the prompt asking for solid deep-charcoal #121316 (visible live in ChatGPT's UI as dark, but the downloaded raster was flattened onto white). Hotspots authored by visual inspection of the cropped/keyed webp, NOT yet browser-verified live -- recommend a quick pass in the prototype to confirm tap-target placement before shipping, especially any nested/adjacent structures.
alt: The human male reproductive system, mid-sagittal cross-section
caption: 📸 Tap each dot to explore — or hit 'Test yourself' to play Label Sprint

hotspots.label: Epididymis
hotspots.detail: A coiled tube where sperm mature and are stored.

hotspots.label: Vas deferens
hotspots.detail: A muscular duct that carries mature sperm from the epididymis toward the urethra.

hotspots.label: Seminal vesicle
hotspots.detail: Secretes a fructose-rich fluid that nourishes sperm and forms part of semen.

hotspots.label: Prostate gland
hotspots.detail: Secretes a milky fluid that activates sperm and adds to semen volume.

hotspots.label: Urethra
hotspots.detail: A shared duct carrying both urine and semen out through the penis.

hotspots.label: Penis
hotspots.detail: The external organ through which semen (and urine) is expelled.

generation_prompt: A clean modern educational textbook illustration of the human male urogenital anatomy in mid-sagittal cross-section, in the style of an NCERT biology diagram. Show clearly separated: testis, epididymis, vas deferens, seminal vesicle, prostate gland, urethra, and the external organ, drawn in a clinical, non-explicit, schematic textbook style. Style: semi-realistic medical-textbook illustration, soft even studio lighting, smooth clean surfaces, muted anatomical palette, flat, no glossy highlights, no neon, no glow. Solid uniform deep-charcoal background, hex #121316, edge to edge. No text, no labels, no numbers, no letters, no leader lines, no arrows, no legend, no watermark. Portrait 3:4, high resolution.
